description_long: This is a multi-story hostel building with a modern, utilitarian design, featuring a tall rectangular tower and an attached lower wing. The facade is primarily light gray with vertical paneling and rows of identical rectangular windows, each with a red accent, creating a repetitive and orderly appearance. The ground level includes a long, glass-enclosed entrance area with a flat canopy, providing shelter and a welcoming approach. The building sits on a paved area, likely intended for pedestrian access, and the lower wing has a more horizontal emphasis with additional windows and a flat roof. There are no visible balconies, but the windows are symmetrically arranged across all facades. The overall structure suggests reinforced concrete and glass construction, typical of institutional or residential urban buildings.
description: A tall, modern hostel with a rectangular tower, attached lower wing, and rows of red-accented windows. The facade is light gray with a glass entrance and flat canopy.
description_view_0: The front view shows the tall tower and the long, glass-covered entrance canopy extending along the base, with the main entrance area clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the symmetrical window arrangement on the tower and the attached lower wing, with the paved area extending alongside the building.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the tower and the lower wing, emphasizing the building's depth and the flat roofs of both sections.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the full height of the tower and the regular window pattern, with the lower wing and entrance canopy visible to the right.
attribute_signage: A small sign labeled 'SIGN' is visible on the left side of the lower wing, near the entrance. The sign is rectangular, gray, and uses simple, sans-serif text.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is located at the base of the tower, featuring a long, glass-enclosed vestibule with a flat, extended canopy. The entrance is wide, with transparent glass doors and side panels, and is accessible from the paved area. The canopy is supported by slender columns and provides shelter for those entering or exiting.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in regular, vertical rows across all facades of the tower, with each floor having a consistent pattern of rectangular windows accented in red. The lower wing also features a row of windows, though they are fewer and more horizontally distributed. All windows appear to be the same size and style, with no decorative frames or shutters.
attribute_architectural_style: Modernist, with a focus on functional form, minimal ornamentation, and repetitive window patterns.
